ranked.rationale: Perfectly satisfies all four weighted preferences: female gender (0.9 explicit), virtual available (0.7 explicit), evening availability (0.6 explicit), and offers CBT (0.5 inferred) — a clean sweep with no compromises.

Matches the two highest-weight explicit preferences — female gender (0.9) and virtual modality (0.7) — but misses evening scheduling (0.6 explicit) with only morning/afternoon slots, and does not offer CBT (0.5 inferred), resulting in meaningful compromise on both remaining preferences.
